content.en:
"Is it good?"

Mingya also knew that this task was very dangerous for Ye Tian, Ye Tian had unlimited potential, so he naturally didn't want to do such a risky thing.

Of course, she can also forcibly order Ye Tian to do it, but it will undoubtedly disgust Ye Tian, in case she deliberately escapes, resulting in the failure of the mission, it will not be good.

After all, the battle of luck is coming to an end, and at this critical moment, there can be no mistakes.

"What benefits do you want?"

The Ancient Demon asked.

Ye Tian thought about it, he had already obtained the inheritance of Aloye's Ultimate Ancient Demon, and he didn't need the inheritance of the Ultimate Ancient Demon-level powerhouse at the moment, so he had to consider the benefits of other aspects.

"Lord Stygian, I want a Nightmare Rama Flower!"

Ye Tian said his request.

The Ancient Demon of the Dark Elegance showed an extremely shocked look, the Nightmare Rama Flower is an extremely rare "Zero Twenty-Seven" treasure, which can make the comprehension of an Ancient Demon-level powerhouse infinitely improved, even an ordinary Ancient Demon-level powerhouse who has not comprehended the rudiments of the Ultimate Rule Realm can also comprehend the Ultimate Rule Realm in an instant.

However, using the Nightmare Rama Flower will deplete the potential of an Ancient Demon-level powerhouse, and after that, it will not be able to advance an inch, and it will even cause a will barrier, and you will not be able to comprehend anything at all.

Of course, some ancient demon-level powerhouses who can't advance an inch also dare to use it, at least they can break through to the realm of top ancient demon-level powerhouses, even if they can't progress anymore, they don't care.

Therefore, the Nightmare Rama Flower is still extremely precious, but where is an ordinary Ancient Demon-level powerhouse qualified to obtain such a treasure.

And those geniuses definitely don't want to refine the Nightmare Rama Flower, if they use it, they will exhaust their potential.

"God, do you want to use your clone to refine the Nightmare Rama Flower? What I want to tell you is that without the life pattern and origin of an ancient demon-level powerhouse, you can't use it. And the clone can't have such potential, and there is no way to use the Nightmare Moro Flower. "

The Ancient Demon introduced.

For countless years, there was no shortage of ancient demon-level powerhouses who wanted to use their clones to refine the Nightmare Rama Flower, but they all failed.

Therefore, the Nightmare Rama Flower is used to break the shackles, such as an ordinary Ancient Demon-level powerhouse attacking a top Ancient Demon-level powerhouse, or impacting the peak Ancient Demon-level powerhouse to the realm of a peak Ancient Demon-level powerhouse.

Of course, even if a peak Ancient Demon-level powerhouse is cultivated, it is still a relatively weak peak-level Ancient Demon-level powerhouse.

But even so, the Nightmare Rama Flower is still an incomparably rare and precious item, ranking among the top three in the battle point exchange list of the Aromu Fortress, and the battle points needed to exchange it are undoubtedly an astronomical amount.

"If this plan succeeds, I can give you a Nightmare Rama flower, but if the plan fails, I can't give it to you, but I can give you other rewards to make it up for you." "

"Yes!"

Ye Tian agreed.

If the plan is successful, he can obtain the Nightmare Rama Flower, which is one of the treasures he wants the most, and it may not be as important as the Ultimate Ancient Demon Inheritance, but it can increase his strength in a short period of time.

Of course, the premise is that he must help the Stygian Ancient Demon lure a peak Ancient Demon-level powerhouse into the trap.

If the plan fails, his replica body will fall, and his special clone will be exposed.

But in any case, this has to be tried.

......

this day.

The three hundred and sixty-five ancient demon-level powerhouses of the main department poured into the battlefield one after another, killing each other, and the battle of luck went to the last moment.

And Ye Tian also appeared, holding a weapon long knife given to him by the Stygian Ancient Demon, this weapon was undoubtedly the top ultimate ancient treasure, which was of great help to him to improve his strength.

He frantically slaughtered an Ancient Demon-level powerhouse, even if several top Ancient Demon-level powerhouses joined forces to attack Ye Tian, they were still defeated by Ye Tian and other top Ancient Demon-level powerhouses in the main department of Ah Luo's mother.

Dom Fortress.

The peak ancient demon-level powerhouse, the Nuofeng Ancient Demon, had a very ugly face, which was really because many of the ancient demon-level powerhouses that Ye Tian had killed belonged to Dom Fortress.

Therefore, he couldn't wait to kill Ye Tian.

"God, this Ancient Demon-level powerhouse from the Arrow-Mother Fortress will definitely be able to become a peak Ancient Demon-level powerhouse in the future, and even surpass a peak Ancient Demon-level powerhouse like the Stygian Ancient Demon, and he can't be allowed to grow. "

The Nuofeng Ancient Demon had the idea of killing Ye Tian.

Immediately, his body moved, and he crossed the void, wanting to find an opportunity to wipe out Ye Tian.

With his peak ancient demon-level strength, it should be easy to kill a Ye Tian, a matter of one move.

This is also in the Huoxi space-time battlefield, if it is in the outside world, he can suppress Ye Tian with a single thought across the long territory, so that he does not have the slightest power to resist....

But in the Huoxi space-time battlefield, his strength was suppressed, and he couldn't exert much strength, but it was still easy to deal with an ordinary ancient demon-level powerhouse.

Soon.

The Nuofeng Ancient Demon locked onto Ye Tian's position, and just happened to see Ye Tian kill another top Ancient Demon-level powerhouse in Dom Fortress, and he was immediately furious.

"Look for death!"

The Nuofeng Ancient Demon made a move, and he wanted to kill Ye Tian with one blow.

Moreover, the Peak Ultimate Arcane of the Body of Time and Space, the Secret Method of Time and Space Form, and other Secret Methods of Form were all urged in a thought, and the life-saving means were brought into full play.

Rumble!!!

Several of his treasures were shattered in an instant, and the body of time and space was also pierced, but it also canceled out part of the attack power, and the secret method of time and space form also allowed Ye Tian to cancel out part of the attack.

Coupled with the five Ultimate Rule Realms, the Ten Thousand Law Form, the Arrow Golden Body Form, and the Arrow Arm Form, under the superposition, he survived.

Of course, in order to block the blow of the Nuofeng Ancient Demon, Ye Tian was still seriously injured.

"You're not dead?"

The Noble Wind Ancient Demon was shocked.

And Ye Tian cast the golden light of Aromu to escape, and the Nuofeng Ancient Demon immediately chased and killed him when he saw this.

He felt that if he attacked two more times at most, he would kill Ye Tian.

In an instant, he went to hunt down Ye Tian 4.2, and he didn't think too much about it.

Between two breaths.

The Nuofeng Ancient Demon caught up with Ye Tian and blasted it with one hand, hitting Ye Tian again.

However, just when Nuo Feng wanted to continue to move, golden silk threads appeared around him, connecting into a twelve-sided diamond-shaped space.

Seeing this, the face of the Nuofeng Ancient Demon changed drastically.

"The Ultimate Space-Time Killing Array!"

"Damn, it's a trap!"

The Nuofeng Ancient Demon erupted with a terrifying momentum, and a top-notch Ultimate Space-Time Ancient Treasure spear was held in his hand, striking at this Ultimate Space-Time Killing Array.

However.

Bang.

This killing array did not move at all, and the traces of the three peak ancient demon-level powerhouses appeared, and they were the three peak ancient demon-level powerhouses of the main department of the Aluo mother, one of which was the Stygian Ancient Demon.
